title: SEO Optimization Input
description: Validated inputs for seo-optimization skill execution

action.description: The SEO workflow phase to execute. Use 'full' for complete 7-phase audit.

url.description: Target URL or domain to audit (e.g., https://example.com)

keywords.description: Seed keywords for keyword research phase

priority.description: Minimum priority level of findings to include in output

output_format.description: Format of the output: full audit report, checklist, or recommendations only
